List the multiples of 8 that are less than 30
showProcess:
Find multiples of 8 up until 30:
8 × 1 = 8
8 × 2 = 16
8 × 3 = 24
8 × 4 = 32 (Too high!)

questionText: List the multiples of 9 that are less than 40

9 × 2 = 18
9 × 3 = 27
9 × 4 = 36
9 × 5 = 45 (Too high!)

questionText: List the multiples of 7 between 10 and 30
showProcess:
Find multiples of 7 that fall inside 10 to 30:
7 × 1 = 7 (Too low)
7 × 2 = 14
7 × 3 = 21
7 × 4 = 28
7 × 5 = 35 (Too high)
